evidence_label: founder approval record gate, not contact permission or treatment advice
private_only_fields: private doctor or lab reply text
required_for_scoped_public_label: approval was recorded outside the public repo
scope is limited to public-safe preclinical quote content
release_block_if: raw message or private contact details appear in public files
patient records or patient samples are included
treatment, dosing, trial-screening, purchase, import, or procurement scope appears
send_can_proceed_only_if: recipient has passed the June 8 qualification gate
outbound packet passed the June 15 gate
sender and recipient details are stored outside the public repo
future replies use the June 13 response-capture gate
decision_rule: The public repo records approval state as labels only. A scoped approval label permits only a later private workflow check; it does not select a recipient, send a message, request samples, or authorize clinical action.
